---
title: "vector.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/vector.py"
loc: 96
complexity: 7
logic_score: 3.10
style_score: 3.61
intel_score: 5.57
overall_score: 4.62
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SovereignVector, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SovereignVector and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 159 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.engine.instruction_loader](file://src.core.engine.instruction_loader)
- [src.core.engine.memory_db](file://src.core.engine.memory_db)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.engine.vector_config](file://src.core.engine.vector_config)
- [src.core.engine.vector_calculus](file://src.core.engine.vector_calculus)
- [src.core.engine.vector_router](file://src.core.engine.vector_router)
- [src.core.engine.vector_shadow](file://src.core.engine.vector_shadow)
- [src.core.engine.vector_ingest](file://src.core.engine.vector_ingest)

### Exports
- `SovereignVector`
- `__init__`
- `skills`
- `vocab`
- `vectors`
- `normalize`
- `search`
- `load_core_skills`
- `add_skill`
- `load_skills_from_dir`
- `build_index`
- `clear_active_ram`
